description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a slender, curved brown stem with a few sparse green leaves emerging at intervals along its length. The plant is housed in a simple, round, brown pot filled with dark soil. The stem appears to be woody and slightly twisted, giving the plant a minimalist and somewhat sparse appearance. The pot itself is unadorned, with a matte finish and no visible decorative elements. The overall look suggests a young or possibly struggling plant, with only a handful of leaves and a lot of exposed stem. This type of potted plant is commonly found in urban environments, such as on windowsills, office desks, or small patios.
description: A minimalist potted plant with a slender, curved brown stem and a few green leaves, set in a plain round brown pot with dark soil. The plant has a sparse, modern appearance suitable for indoor urban spaces.
description_view_0: Curved stem with two visible leaves, plain brown pot, and dark soil are clearly seen.
description_view_1: Front view shows the stem mostly upright with leaves aligned, pot appears symmetrical.
description_view_2: Curved stem leans to the left, with leaves spaced along the stem, pot remains plain.
description_view_3: Back view reveals the straightest aspect of the stem, with leaves less visible, pot is unadorned.
attribute_plant_species: generic houseplant (possibly a young vine or sapling)
